name: Fuster Cluck
description: A Bandit MIRV grenade that starts splitting almost as soon as it leaves your hand instead of waiting for the main grenade to land. The spread is chaotic and unreliable at range, but at close distance it can flood a packed area with explosions almost instantly. Salvador gets especially good value from it, since Double Your Fun lets him blanket nearby enemies with two throws for the cost of one while Gunzerking.
notes: Its name is a pun on "clusterfuck," fitting the grenade's wildly chaotic spread.

special.description: The child grenades split in mid-air almost immediately after the throw.
special.title: Make it rain!
